Title: 强化学习智能体的轨迹与文本转换方法研究
Student Name: 李开元
Student ID: 201300003
Abstract: 强化学习作为人工智能的关键分支，其核心在于智能体通过与环境的交互学习最优策略。强化学习的轨迹数据，即智能体在特定任务中的行为序列，对于评估和优化智能体策略至关重要。它详细记录了智能体的行为，而且为性能评估和策略改进提供了实证基础。此外，轨迹还能作为训练数据，促进智能体在后续任务中实现更高的奖励累积。然而，获取高质量的强化学习轨迹数据存在挑战，通常需要领域专家的深入参与，以及在复杂仿真环境中进行大量的实验模拟。此外，强化学习轨迹的可解释性也面临挑战，尤其是对于非专业人士而言，理解由状态、动作和奖励构成的三元组数据较为困难。针对上述挑战，本研究提出了一种创新方法，旨在实现强化学习轨迹数据与自然语言文本之间的双向转换。通过微调预训练的大语言模型，本研究构建了一个框架，该框架能够理解强化学习轨迹数据与自然语言文本之间的对应关系，并实现它们之间的有效转换。本方法一方面通过将自然语言目标转换为轨迹数据，能有效地扩充训练集，实现数据的增广，提高智能体策略的学习效率；另一方面，通过将轨迹数据转换为易于理解的自然语言描述，显著提升了数据的可解释性，使得非专业人士也能更好地理解智能体的行为模式。本研究成功地缩小了预训练语言模型与强化学习轨迹之间的差异，为利用语言模型进行强化学习轨迹的生成和解释开辟了新的途径，并展示了其在实际应用中的潜力和效果。

Keywords: 关键词：强化学习；大语言模型；轨迹生成；自然语言指令

English Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL), a pivotal branch of artificial intelligence, hinges on the learning of optimal policies through an agent's interaction with its environment. The trajectory data in RL, which represents the sequence of actions taken by an agent in a specific task, is crucial for evaluating and refining the agent's strategies. It meticulously documents the agent's behavior and provides an empirical foundation for performance assessment and strategic enhancement. Moreover, trajectory data can also serve as training material, facilitating superior reward accumulation in subsequent tasks. However, obtaining high- quality RL trajectory data presents challenges, often necessitating the deep involvement of domain experts and extensive experimental simulations in complex simulation environments. Additionally, the interpretability of RL trajectories faces hurdles, particularly for non- experts due to the difficulty of comprehending the triplet data composed of states, actions, and rewards. To address the aforementioned challenges, this study introduces an innovative method aimed at achieving a bidirectional transformation between RL trajectory data and natural language texts. By fine- tuning a pre- trained large language model, this research constructs a framework capable of understanding the correspondence between RL trajectory data and natural language texts, enabling their effective transformation. On one hand, this method can effectively expand the training set by converting natural language goals into trajectory data, thus achieving data augmentation and improving the learning efficiency of the agent's strategy. On the other hand, by translating trajectory data into understandable natural language descriptions, it significantly enhances data interpretability, allowingnon- experts to better comprehend agent behavior patterns. This study has successfully bridged the gap between pre- trained language models and RL trajectories, paving new avenues for the generation and interpretation of RL trajectories using language models, and demonstrating their potential and effectiveness in practical applications.

English Keywords:  Reinforcement Learning; Large Language Model; Trajectory Generation; Natural Language Instruction

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
